domains.rationale: Small pilot sample limits precision and generalizability.
Cognition and mobility endpoints are clinically relevant but exploratory in this evidence slice.

limitations: Treat as feasibility and exploratory functional evidence.
Do not use as definitive Alzheimer's disease efficacy evidence.

provenance.note: Triage-level generated record pending source-located extraction.

notes: Provisional agent triage; not a formal ROB2 or ROBINS-I domain-by-domain assessment.
